rust.principle: Uhura has immutable let and no mut or local reassignment.
rust.expectedRepair: Return value + 1 directly or bind a new immutable local.

rust.principle: Uhura values are not Rust references and have no borrow syntax.
rust.expectedRepair: Accept Request by value: fn label(request: Request) -> Text.

rust.principle: pub struct exposes the complete field contract; fields never carry pub.
Machine-domain payload declarations are named but construction and patterns are positional.
A Reads computed member is value-like, not a method.
Effectful updates cannot nest inside arguments.
rust.expectedRepair: Bind the complete refresh update call to let label, then call notice.show(label) as the next statement.

rust.principle: Table::from accepts only an exhaustive literal for every unit key constructor.
rust.expectedRepair: Write the exhaustive literal directly or use Map when the domain is dynamic.

rust.principle: The deterministic reaction fault is unreachable; and Uhura has no macros.
UI requires direct unaliased activation in the same logical module.
rust.expectedRepair: Replace the alias with use uhura::ui;.

rust.principle: Logical module paths are locators; package identity plus public name defines public semantic identity.
rust.expectedRepair: Update use paths only; preserve semantic identity when public name and lowering are unchanged.

typescript.principle: Input committed state must not be mutated.
typescript.expectedRepair: Return a copied state with count: state.count + 1n.

typescript.principle: any defeats the closed input claim.
typescript.expectedRepair: Type input as the exact declared Input union.

typescript.principle: A type assertion is not exact boundary admission.
typescript.expectedRepair: Decode and validate every field and tag before constructing ProgressInput.

typescript.principle: A default that returns a domain result hides non-exhaustiveness.
typescript.expectedRepair: Handle every union case and send the default value to assertNever.

typescript.principle: Commands are returned inert data, not executed authority.
typescript.expectedRepair: Return a start command object in commands and remove worker.start.

typescript.principle: ReadonlyMap is not runtime immutable and input state must remain unchanged.
typescript.expectedRepair: Copy with new Map(state.tasks), update the copy, and publish the copy.

typescript.principle: One semantic step is synchronous; external completion is a later correlated input.
typescript.expectedRepair: Return a command now and add a later result input handled by a synchronous reducer.

typescript.principle: A decoded contextual invalidity is a domain classification, not an exception.
typescript.expectedRepair: Return original state, invalid classification, and empty commands.

typescript.principle: Ambient clock and randomness destroy deterministic replay.
typescript.expectedRepair: Receive or allocate identity through explicit deterministic state/input protocol.

typescript.principle: Native Map traversal must not define task-visible FIFO.
typescript.expectedRepair: Read and update the explicit ordered queue.
